channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Nvidia AI Chip Shortage Worsens Amid Chinese H20 Orders and Proposed US Sales Ban
item.description: Nvidia faces a severe shortage of its AI chips, particularly the H20 model, due to massive orders from Chinese companies like ByteDance, Alibaba Group, and Tencent Holdings. The proposed US sales ban on the chip has exacerbated the situation, prompting concerns about global supply chain disruptions.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Nvidia Sets New Records in AI Performance Benchmarks - AI Computing Advancements
item.description: Nvidia releases MLPerf Inference V5.0 benchmark results for its Blackwell GPU, achieving record-breaking performance and setting the stage for future AI computing advancements.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
